prompts.label: VPC public and private tiers
prompts.text:
Explain public subnets for load balancers versus private subnets for application tasks.
Mention NAT gateway cost as a common surprise.
Advise planning CIDR ranges to avoid collisions across peered networks.
Encourage tagging owners as early hygiene.
Point to flow logs as optional deeper visibility.

prompts.label: IAM conditions tighten policies
prompts.text:

Explain explicit deny power carefully.
Mention policy simulator as a learning tool.
Warn about wildcards expanding blast radius.

prompts.label: S3 lifecycle policies
prompts.text:
Describe transitions to infrequent access or colder tiers for old objects.
Explain retrieval cost trade-offs simply.
Mention cleaning up failed multipart uploads.
Advise notifications for unusual access patterns only lightly.
Connect to event-driven fanout ideas briefly.

prompts.label: CloudFront signed URLs
prompts.text:
Explain serving private content through CloudFront with signed URLs or cookies.
Mention origin access control concepts at a modern naming level.
Warn about cache invalidation costs operationally.
Discuss compression benefits.
Advise testing signed URL expiry behavior.

prompts.label: SQS visibility timeout behavior
prompts.text:
Explain why consumers extend or fail visibility when processing takes longer.
Describe dead-letter queues after repeated failures.
Emphasize idempotent processing.
Compare standard versus FIFO when ordering matters.
Mention SNS fan-out as related reading.

prompts.label: ECS Fargate sizing
prompts.text:

Discuss secrets injection via task definitions lightly.
Advise sidecars for observability only as a pointer.
Encourage rolling deployments understanding.

prompts.label: RDS Multi-AZ versus replicas
prompts.text:

Explain replica lag as user-visible sometimes.
Mention backups and maintenance windows casually.
Advise connection pooling at the app layer.
Position Aurora as optional advanced reading.

prompts.label: API Gateway plus Lambda proxy

prompts.label: Cost anomalies and budgets
prompts.text:
Recommend budget alerts plus anomaly detection for surprise spend.
Discuss tagging completeness enabling attribution.
Mention separating sandbox accounts politely.
Advise blaming processes not people in incident reviews culturally.
Point to Saving Plans versus Reserved comparisons lightly.

prompts.label: STS AssumeRole across accounts
prompts.text:
Explain trusting another account via role assumption.
